---
title: "Willemijn Leiner"
image: images/IMG_5416.jpeg
toc: false

about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/willemijn-leiner-8120b8345/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://leiner3.github.io
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:willemijnleiner@gmail.com
---

Hello! My name is Willemijn Leiner, I love psychology and statistics, and what I love even more is hanging out with my two dogs!

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Data Science Project 1
miniproject1.qmd

## Data Science Project 2
miniproject2.qmd
:::
